ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Higgsfield-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Higgsfield-AI
Language: javascript
Open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI — Free AI image generation & cinema studio with 20+ models (Flux, SDXL, Midjourney, Ideogram). Self-hosted, customizable, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: expo/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/expo/skills
Language: javascript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: h5bp/html5-boilerplate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/h5bp/html5-boilerplate

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maboloshi/github-chinese

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yctimlin/mcp_excalidraw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yctimlin/mcp_excalidraw
Language: javascript
MCP server and Claude Code skill for Excalidraw — programmatic canvas toolkit to create, edit, and export diagrams via AI agents with real-time canvas sync.
